mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Review r LEFT OUTER JOIN Company c ON r.company_no = c.company_no WHERE r.approval_status = 'APPROVED'
AND r.is_paid = #{isPaid}
AND JSON_CONTAINS(c.com_type, JSON_QUOTE(#{category}))
AND c.com_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') AND r.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (c.com_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR r.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))

SELECT r.review_no AS reviewNo, CASE WHEN m.status = 'WITHDRAWN' THEN '탈퇴회원' ELSE d.nickname END AS nickname, r.user_id AS userId, r.rating AS rating, r.view_cnt AS viewCnt, r.like_cnt AS likeCnt, r.title, r.is_paid AS isPaid, r.content AS content, r.img_url AS imgUrl, r.stored_name AS storedName, IFNULL(r.thumbnail_url, r.img_url) AS thumbnailUrl, IFNULL(c.com_name, '일반 리뷰') AS comName, c.com_type AS comType, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment com WHERE com.review_no = r.review_no) AS commentCnt, CASE WHEN r.stored_name IS NOT NULL OR (r.img_url IS NOT NULL AND r.img_url != '') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS hasImg, DATE_FORMAT(r.reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDate,
CASE WHEN p.review_no IS NOT NULL THEN 'ALREADY_VIEWED' ELSE 'NOT_VIEWED' END AS viewStatus
FROM Review r LEFT OUTER JOIN Company c ON r.company_no = c.company_no LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON r.user_id = m.user_id LEFT JOIN USER_DETAIL d ON r.user_id = d.user_id
LEFT OUTER JOIN Pass_Usage_Log p ON r.review_no = p.review_no AND p.user_id = #{sessionId} WHERE r.approval_status = 'APPROVED'
AND r.is_paid = #{isPaid}
AND JSON_CONTAINS(c.com_type, JSON_QUOTE(#{category}))
AND c.com_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND r.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (c.com_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR r.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY r.view_cnt DESC, r.reg_date DESC
ORDER BY r.like_cnt DESC, r.reg_date DESC
ORDER BY r.reg_date DESC
LIMIT #{startIndex}, #{pageSize}

SELECT r.review_no AS reviewNo, CASE WHEN m.status = 'WITHDRAWN' THEN '탈퇴회원' ELSE d.nickname END AS nickname, r.user_id AS userId, r.company_no AS companyNo, r.res_no AS resNo, r.rating AS rating, r.approval_status AS approvalStatus, r.view_cnt AS viewCnt, r.like_cnt AS likeCnt, r.is_paid AS isPaid, r.receipt_name AS receiptName, r.title AS title, r.content AS content, r.booking_source AS bookingSource, r.original_name AS originalName, r.stored_name AS storedName, r.img_url AS imgUrl, r.img_description AS imgDescription, r.total_cost AS totalCost, r.external_name AS externalName, DATE_FORMAT(r.reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS regDate, c.com_name AS comName, p.product_name AS productName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Review_Like WHERE review_no = r.review_no AND user_id = #{userId}) AS isLiked,
(SELECT review_no FROM Review WHERE review_no < r.review_no AND approval_status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY review_no DESC LIMIT 1) AS prevNo, (SELECT title FROM Review WHERE review_no < r.review_no AND approval_status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY review_no DESC LIMIT 1) AS prevTitle,
(SELECT review_no FROM Review WHERE review_no > r.review_no AND approval_status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY review_no ASC LIMIT 1) AS nextNo, (SELECT title FROM Review WHERE review_no > r.review_no AND approval_status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY review_no ASC LIMIT 1) AS nextTitle
FROM Review r LEFT OUTER JOIN Company c ON r.company_no = c.company_no LEFT OUTER JOIN product p ON r.product_no = p.product_no LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON r.user_id = m.user_id LEFT JOIN USER_DETAIL d ON r.user_id = d.user_id WHERE r.review_no = #{reviewNo}

SELECT r.review_no AS reviewNo, r.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, r.title, IFNULL(r.thumbnail_url, r.img_url) AS thumbnailUrl, r.img_url AS imgUrl, r.like_cnt AS likeCnt, r.view_cnt AS viewCnt, r.is_paid AS isPaid, IFNULL(c.com_name, '일반 리뷰') AS comName, CASE WHEN (r.img_url IS NOT NULL AND r.img_url != '') OR (r.stored_name IS NOT NULL AND r.stored_name != '') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS hasImg,
CASE WHEN p.review_no IS NOT NULL THEN 'ALREADY_VIEWED' ELSE 'NOT_VIEWED' END AS viewStatus
FROM Review r LEFT OUTER JOIN Company c ON r.company_no = c.company_no LEFT OUTER JOIN user_detail u ON r.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT OUTER JOIN Pass_Usage_Log p ON r.review_no = p.review_no AND p.user_id = #{sessionId} WHERE r.approval_status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY r.like_cnt DESC, r.view_cnt DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT company_no AS companyNo, com_name AS comName, com_type AS comType, com_address AS comAddress FROM Company WHERE company_no = #{companyNo}
SELECT product_no AS productNo, product_name AS productName, original_price AS originalPrice FROM product WHERE company_no = #{companyNo} AND is_active = 1
SELECT company_no AS companyNo, com_name AS comName, com_type AS comType FROM Company WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' OR status IS NULL ORDER BY com_type ASC, com_name ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Review_Like WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Review_Like (review_no, user_id, reg_date) VALUES (#{reviewNo}, #{userId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM Review_Like WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE Review SET like_cnt = like_cnt + #{amount} WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo}
UPDATE User_Pass_Wallet SET remaining_count = remaining_count - 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND remaining_count > 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Pass_Usage_Log (user_id, review_no, used_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{reviewNo}, NOW())
INSERT INTO free_view_log (user_id, review_no, viewed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{reviewNo}, NOW())
